oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Calling All “Golden” Birds
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Staff, AFA Watchbird
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 51 Number 1 (January/February 2024).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Editor’s Note: A special thank you to those who shared pictures of their “golden” birds in celebration of AFA ’s 50th anniversary. Several are pictured on this issue ’s cover and you will be hearing more about them in future issues.Don’t miss the article on golden eagles in this edition. The beautiful golden conure pictured here is 3 years old and will be gracing a new AFA brochure. The bird belongs to Magaly Salas.Birds of the World Crossword Puzzle Solution If you have a golden bird who ’s story you would like considered for publication in Watchbird, send a hi - resolution picture(s) of your bird with your name and email address and a brief write -up of no more than 100 words to watchbird@afabirds.org.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 51 No. 1 (2024): Watchbird January/February 2024; 15
